name: Krispain Hero Roguelite Dungeon Shooter Simulator

reviews.review_description: I really want to play this game, please fix the problems.  Can't pick up the next weapon, plz remove red lines.  I love roguelike games and was so excited to try this one out, so plz fix.  I think this game could be really fun.  Thank you.

developer_response.body:
Hello!
Thank you for the review you left. We took into consideration every mentioned detail and also fixed the bug that bothers you. Now we will be more than happy if you play it again!

reviews.review_description:
Never heard of this game, so after a quick look at the Nintendo version on YouTube, I thought this might be a good laugh.

Graphically it's not bad, and you move around nicely, but there are a few things that needs serious work...

1) Presentation - Very basic. No leaderboards, nothing that would drive you to replay this.

2) Remove the annoying pointer red lines during the game.

3) This is the nail in the coffin for me - The weapons. Everything about the weapons is awful. The handling, the graphics, the sound FX, no vibration. One or two guns made a pathetic unrealistic tap tap noise. I kept restarting the game thinking there was a glitch and everything will be fine after I restarted. Nope. 

Shame.

developer_response.body:
Hello!
Thank you for the review you left. We took into consideration every mentioned detail and also fixed the bug that bothers you. Now we will be more than happy if you play it again!
